---
pagetitle: "Yash Tiwari — Portfolio"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     NAVBAR
     EDIT NAV LINKS HERE — update href values to change destinations.
     The active link is set automatically by JS (js/main.js).
     GitHub / LinkedIn hrefs are also here.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<header class="navbar">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-logo">YT.</a>

  <nav class="nav-links">
    <a href="index.html"    class="nav-link">Home</a>
    <a href="projects.html" class="nav-link">Projects</a>
    <a href="resume.html"   class="nav-link">Resume</a>
    <a href="about.html"    class="nav-link">About</a>
  </nav>

  <div class="nav-right">
    <!-- GitHub — EDIT href -->
    <a href="https://github.com/rsm-ytiwari" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="GitHub">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <!-- LinkedIn — EDIT href -->
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yash-tiwari-here/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="LinkedIn">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/>
        <rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <!-- Search (decorative — wire up if needed) -->
    <button class="nav-icon" aria-label="Search">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/>
      </svg>
    </button>
    <!-- Theme toggle -->
    <button class="theme-pill" id="theme-toggle" aria-label="Toggle theme">
      <span id="theme-icon">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/>
        </svg>
      </span>
      <span id="theme-label">Dark</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</header>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero-wrap">
  <div class="hero-inner">

    <!-- LEFT COLUMN ──────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div>

      <!-- Availability badge — EDIT badge text here -->
      <div class="badge">
        <span class="badge-dot"></span>
        <span class="badge-text">Open to Opportunities</span>
      </div>

      <!-- Name — EDIT HERE -->
      <h1 class="hero-name">Yash Tiwari</h1>

      <!-- Typewriter role line — EDIT in js/main.js → TW_TEXT -->
      <p class="hero-role" id="typewriter" aria-label="MS Business Analytics · Builder · Agentic AI"></p>

      <!-- ── EDIT BIO HERE ──────────────────────────────── -->
      <p class="hero-bio" style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
        Building AI systems that act, grounded in ML.
        Two startups. ML pipelines ranked #1 out of 60 teams.
        Systems that automate real work, not demos.
      </p>
      <p class="hero-bio" style="margin-bottom: 44px;">
        Engineering, business, and UX, each sharpening
        the other in practice. I work best when something
        real needs to ship.
      </p>
      <!-- ── END BIO ──────────────────────────────────── -->

      <div class="cta-row">
        <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">
          View Projects
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/>
          </svg>
        </a>
        <!-- EDIT href to point to your resume PDF -->
        <a href="assets/resume.pdf" download class="btn-ghost">
          Download Resume
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/>
            <polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/>
          </svg>
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="scroll-hint">
        <svg class="scroll-chev" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/>
        </svg>
        <span>Scroll</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- RIGHT COLUMN — BENTO GRID ───────────────────────── -->
    <!-- ── EDIT BENTO HERE ── each .cell is one card -->
    <div class="bento">

      <!-- Cell A: Role interest — EDIT to update target roles -->
      <div class="cell">
        <span class="c-label">Looking to Build</span>
        <div class="c-t1">Where data meets decisions</div>
        <div class="c-t2">Roles where models ship to production, not slides</div>
        <hr class="c-div">
        <div class="c-t3">open to DS, analytics &amp; AI-adjacent roles</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Cell B: Availability — EDIT dates here -->
      <div class="cell cell-available">
        <span class="c-label">Available</span>
        <div class="c-t1-avail">Dec 2026</div>
        <div class="c-t2">Full-time · Open to relocate</div>
        <hr class="c-div">
        <div class="c-t2">Summer 2026 · Internship</div>
        <div class="dot-row">
          <span class="dot-green"></span>
          <span class="c-t2" style="font-size:10px">Actively looking</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Cell C: Terminal (full width) — EDIT lines below -->
      <div class="cell cell-full terminal-cell">
        <div class="mac-dots">
          <div class="mac-dot" style="background:#FF5F57"></div>
          <div class="mac-dot" style="background:#FEBC2E"></div>
          <div class="mac-dot" style="background:#28C840"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="t-dim">&gt;&gt;&gt; yt.load('yash_tiwari')</div>
        <div class="t-dim">&gt;&gt;&gt; profile.arc</div>
        <div class="t-bright">['2x founder', 'defense UX', 'ML analyst', 'agent builder']</div>
        <div class="t-dim">&gt;&gt;&gt; profile.approach</div>
        <div class="t-bright">'Ship first. Explain why it works second.'</div>
        <div class="t-bright"><span class="blink-cursor">█</span></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Cell D: Philosophy + current work -->
      <div class="cell">
        <span class="c-label">Philosophy</span>
        <div class="c-quote">"You are what<br>you don't automate."</div>
        <hr class="c-div">
        <div class="c-building-sub">Currently Building</div>
        <div class="c-t2">Agentic Workflows · n8n · OpenAI API</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Cell E: Contact — EDIT email + copy-btn target in js/main.js -->
      <div class="cell cell-contact">
        <span class="c-label">Let's Talk</span>
        <div class="c-t1" style="font-size:14px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:0">ytiwari@ucsd.edu</div>
        <button class="copy-btn" id="copy-btn">Copy email ↗</button>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /bento -->
    <!-- ── END BENTO ── -->

  </div><!-- /hero-inner -->
</div><!-- /hero-wrap -->


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TOOLS STRIP (marquee)
     EDIT the text inside .marquee-track to change the tools shown.
     Duplicate the text twice (needed for seamless loop).
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="tools-strip">
  <span class="tools-label">Tools &amp; Technologies</span>
  <div class="marquee-wrap">
    <div class="marquee-track">
      Python · SQL · Pandas · Polars · Scikit-learn · XGBoost · PyTorch · Tableau · Snowflake · FastAPI · Streamlit · n8n · Git · &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
      Python · SQL · Pandas · Polars · Scikit-learn · XGBoost · PyTorch · Tableau · Snowflake · FastAPI · Streamlit · n8n · Git · &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SELECTED WORK — featured projects pulled from projects.json
     Set featured: true (max 3) in projects.json to show here.
     Full grid lives in projects.qmd.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<!-- Featured projects pulled from projects.json
     Set featured: true (max 3) to show here -->
<div class="projects-section" id="projects">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <span class="sec-label">Selected Work</span>
    <div class="sec-line"></div>
  </div>

  <div id="featured-grid" class="cards-grid"></div>

  <div class="view-all">
    <a href="projects.html">View all projects →</a>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- ── END PROJECTS ── -->

<script>
/* EDIT projects.json to add/remove featured projects */
(function () {
  const depth = window.location.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean).length;
  const base  = depth > 1 ? '../'.repeat(depth - 1) : './';

  function cardHTML(item) {
    const preview = item.image
      ? `<img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.title}" class="p-preview-img">`
      : `<div class="p-preview"><span>Project Preview</span></div>`;

    const tags = item.tags.slice(0, 4)
      .map(t => `<span class="p-tag">${t}</span>`)
      .join('');

    const link = item.href || '#';

    return `
      <div class="p-card">
        ${preview}
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-meta">
            <span class="p-num">${item.number}</span>
            <span class="p-year">${item.year}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="p-title">${item.title}</div>
          <div class="p-desc">${item.summary}</div>
          <div class="p-tags">${tags}</div>
          <a href="${link}" class="p-more">Read more →</a>
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }

  fetch(base + 'projects.json')
    .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function (projects) {
      const featured = projects.filter(function (p) { return p.featured; }).slice(0, 3);
      document.getElementById('featured-grid').innerHTML =
        featured.map(cardHTML).join('');
      document.querySelectorAll('#featured-grid .p-card').forEach(function (card) {
        card.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
          if (e.target.closest('a')) return;
          var link = this.querySelector('.p-more');
          if (link && link.getAttribute('href') !== '#') {
            this.blur();
            window.location.href = link.href;
          }
        });
      });
    })
    .catch(function (err) {
      console.error('Could not load projects.json:', err);
    });
})();
</script>


<!-- Toast notification (used by copy-email button) -->
<div class="toast" id="toast">✓ Copied to clipboard</div>
```
